behavior_summary: This script implements minimal mirror-item behavior for when the mirror is struck and when it is released/cleaned up.
U8P_MIRROR::gotHit is the process entry invoked on impact/hit; it delegates handling to an internal mirror handler and then suspends the process.

U8P_MIRROR::release adjusts an item's frame bits (notably bit 0x04) depending on a check for whether the referenced item is an NPC; it reads and writes the item's frame via Item::getFrame and Item::setFrame.
notable_control_flow: U8P_MIRROR::gotHit: immediate delegation -> U8P_MIRROR::func009D, then suspend (process waits/ends) (confidence: high).

U8P_MIRROR::release: initialize local marker local0=0; if an implicit 'this' condition holds, call Item::isNpc(addressof(local1)) and set local0 if true; read item frame and either OR 0x04 or AND 0x03 and write back with Item::setFrame based on local0 and the 'this' condition (confidence: medium).
No global flags are read or written by either routine (confidence: high).
open_questions: What exact behavior U8P_MIRROR::func009D implements when the mirror is hit (the delegated inner handler is not present in this excerpt).
What the implicit 'this' condition represents in U8P_MIRROR::release: whether it is testing ownership, activation state, or another context flag (inference only).
Precise gameplay meaning of frame bit 0x04 (visual flip, collision toggle, or other state) and why it is conditionally set/cleared for NPC items (inferred).

main_function.name: U8P_MIRROR::gotHit
main_function.purpose: Entry-point for the mirror being struck: forward the hit context to a mirror-specific handler and then suspend the hit process.
entry_conditions: Triggered by the engine when the object/item representing the mirror receives a hit/damage event.
Receives two parameters (uword, word) that are passed through to the internal handler.

function_map.name: U8P_MIRROR::gotHit
function_map.role: process entry for hit events — delegates to inner handler then suspends

function_map.name: U8P_MIRROR::release
function_map.role: adjust item/frame state on U8P_MIRROR::release (set/clear frame bit 0x04 depending on NPC check and context)

function_map.name: U8P_MIRROR::func009D
function_map.role: inner mirror-specific hit handler (delegated-to by U8P_MIRROR::gotHit); details not present

function_map.name: Item::isNpc
function_map.role: query whether an item reference is an NPC (used by U8P_MIRROR::release to set a local marker)

function_map.name: Item::getFrame
function_map.role: read current item frame/state bits before modification

function_map.name: Item::setFrame
function_map.role: write modified frame/state bits back to the item

internal_calls.purpose: Delegate mirror-specific reaction to being hit; U8P_MIRROR::gotHit acts as a thin wrapper/forwarder.

external_calls.purpose: Determine whether the referenced item is an NPC; result sets a local marker (local0) that influences frame writes.
Read the item's current frame bits so the code can compute an OR/AND modification (e.g., set/clear bit 0x04).
Write the computed frame value back to the item to toggle or mask frame bits (used to set 0x04 or mask with 0x03).

quick_facts.behavior_summary_one_liner: This script implements minimal mirror-item behavior for when the mirror is struck and when it is released/cleaned up.
